economic_notes: First Nation has investment in Musgamagw Dzawada'enuxw Fisheries Group Limited Partnership (33.33% share) focused on marine activities and economic development. Also has Dzawada'enuxw Development Corporation. COVID-19 noted as significant event in March 2020.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - auditors unable to obtain sufficient evidence to support deferred revenue recognition for both 2020 and 2019. CMHC Social Housing Program is consolidated as a subsidiary. Two partnerships (Musgamagw Dzawada'enuxw Fisheries Group Limited Partnership and Dzawada'enuxw Development Corporation) are accounted for using modified equity method and not consolidated. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided financial statements. COVID-19 disclosed as a significant event. expenses_administration uses Band Government actual expenses; expenses_infrastructure uses Public Works actual expenses. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + Inter Tribal Health Authority + First Nation Health Authority + FNESC + CMHC + NVIAATS + Ottawa Trust + Province of BC = 2460639+69736+456053+193719+28221+20773+2466+344714 = 3576321 (slight rounding from schedule totals used).
